title: DESNZ annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This report sets out the activities of the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) over the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  It provides detailed information for the department and its partner organisations on:   our financial performance and position how we used our resources our strategy and achievements over the period our objectives   The resource accounts provide detailed accounting and expenditure information for the financial year 2024 to 2025.  "
